data.title: Rakuten Medical expands academic access to IR700 dye through fee-only provision, enhancing publication freedom and opening up commercialization opportunities.
data.description: Rakuten Medical has developed a light-activatable IR700 dye which is a key component in the approved medication Akalux™. This dye has been clinically proven to be effective and safe, with hydrophilic properties and minimal toxicity. The IR700 dye is versatile and can be utilized in various therapeutic approaches. Widening access to IR700 dye in academic settings is predicted to boost open innovation and...

data.title: Amtrak holding public board meeting online on Jan. 28, 2026 to discuss financial and operational performance.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, the Amtrak Board of Directors will hold a meeting that will be open to the public through virtual means. Executives from Amtrak are set to present reports on the company's financial standing and operational achievements. The meeting will cover important updates regarding major aspects of Amtrak's operations.

data.title: ACRES Commercial Realty Corp. prices $1.0 billion CLO backed by commercial mortgage loans with $879.5 million Offered Notes.
data.description: In Uniondale, New York on January 20, 2026, ACRES Commercial Realty Corp. (NYSE: ACR) shared news about its new subsidiary, ACRES Commercial Realty 2026-FL4 Issuer, LLC, planning to release $879.5 million in non-recourse, floating-rate notes known as "Offered Notes."

data.title: Hyundai Chairman Chung Kisun discusses AI and energy at Davos, attends 2026 Annual Meeting for fourth year, talks expansion with Palantir CEO.
data.description: Chung, Chairman, successfully attended his fourth consecutive 2026 World Economic Forum Annual Meeting, focusing on AI-driven transformation and innovation in energy transition during significant sessions. He also engaged in a meeting with Alex Karp, Co-founder and CEO of Palantir, to deliberate on expanding their strategic partnership. The meeting took place in SEOUL, South Korea.

data.title: NEDHSA to host NED Talk Road Tour in Tallulah, LA on Jan. 22, 2026, focusing on substance abuse prevention from 10:00 am to 1:00 pm at Tallulah Community Center.
data.description: In Tallulah, Louisiana on January 20, 2026, the Northeast Delta Human Services Authority (NEDHSA) is set to organize the Northeast Delta Talk (NED Talk) Road Tour, scheduled for Thursday, January 22, 2026, running from 10:00 a.m. to 1:00 p.m. The event will take place at the Tallulah Community Center and aims to provide a platform for discussion and sharing of ideas.

data.title: Liberty Energy Inc. (NYSE: LBRT) moves earnings call time to 7:30 am MT on Jan 29, 2026, 30 mins earlier than planned. Financial results released after market close on Jan 28, 2026.
data.description: Denver based company Liberty Energy Inc. (NYSE: LBRT) has rescheduled its fourth quarter and full year 2025 earnings conference call to begin at 7:30 a.m. Mountain Time (9:30 a.m. Eastern Time) on Thursday, January 29, 2026, which is 30 minutes earlier than initially planned. The financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2025 will be disclosed post-market closure on Wednesday, January 28, 2026.

data.title: NHSA partners with EarlyDay platform for Head Start locations to address staffing issues. - 107 characters
data.description: A recent collaboration with EarlyDay has paved the way for Head Start facilities to utilize a specialized recruiting and hiring platform tailored for the early childhood sector in their efforts to address staffing obstacles. This partnership was announced in San Francisco on January 20, 2026. The National Head Start Association (NHSA), a prominent advocate for early childhood education, has spearheaded this initiative to provide Head Start locations with access to a platform designed to streamline the recruitment and hiring process, ultimately enhancing workforce management.

data.title: Consumer watchdog group received $1.4M+ in state fees in 2025, 96.8% of funds from Prop 103, adding to millions since its inception.
data.description: A contentious organization has received 96.8% of funds from a program it established in Proposition 103. The organization has amassed tens of millions since the program's initiation. Information disclosed by the California Department of Insurance unveils this concerning trend.

data.title: Dr. Timothy Lubenow moved from academia to MAPS Centers for Pain Control in Chicago, bringing advanced relief directly to patients.
data.description: Dr. Timothy R. Lubenow, previously the Chair of Pain Medicine at Rush University, has recently joined MAPS Centers for Pain Control based in Chicago on January 20, 2026. Dr. Lubenow, who originally began his career at Rush as an anesthesiology resident in the 1980s, witnessed the evolution of pain medicine during his tenure there. This move signifies a significant change in the healthcare landscape, with Dr. Lubenow bringing a wealth of experience and knowledge to MAPS Centers for Pain Control.

data.title: Equity LifeStyle Properties, Inc. to release 4th quarter 2025 earnings on Jan. 28 after market close. #ELS #NYSE #earnings.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Equity LifeStyle Properties, Inc. (NYSE: ELS) shared that its fourth quarter 2025 earnings report will be disclosed on January 28, 2026, after the market closes. The Company's financial performance for that quarter will be made public on that date.

data.title: CoreAge Rx expands GLP-1 weight program to support New Year weight loss goals with increased access for clients.
data.description: In Wichita Falls, Texas on January 20, 2026, CoreAge Rx, a prominent telehealth pharmacy known for its personalized medication services, revealed plans for a significant New Year's expansion focused on its compounded GLP-1 weight management program. This strategic move aims to enhance access to this program and cater to a larger clientele.

data.title: Liberty Energy Inc (NYSE: LBRT) declares $0.09 per share dividend, to be paid on March 18, 2026 to holders as of March 4.
data.description: In Denver, Liberty Energy Inc. (NYSE: LBRT) revealed that their Board of Directors has confirmed a dividend of $0.09 per share of Class A common stock. This dividend is scheduled to be distributed on March 18, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of March 4, 2026. The Board will need to approve any upcoming quarterly cash dividends, with each declaration dependent on their ongoing evaluation of what is most advantageous for Liberty.
